command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Set DEBUG logging temporarily? Check current log level handling ==="
# Send message and immediately watch connections to 8080
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)

# Start a background connection watcher
(for i in $(seq 1 20); do sudo ss -tnp 2>/dev/null | grep ':8080' | grep -v LISTEN; sleep 0.5; done) > /tmp/conns.txt 2>&1 &
WATCHER=$!

sleep 1
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/sendMessage" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chat_id":"-1003934415467","text":"Connection watch test - Sakura online?"}' >/dev/null
echo "message sent, watching connections for 10s..."

wait $WATCHER
echo "=== Connections seen to :8080 during the window ==="
sort -u /tmp/conns.txt | head -20
echo "(cloudflared from .191/.201 connecting = delivery arriving)"

echo ""
echo "=== New gateway.log after 15s ==="
sleep 15
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | tail -15
rm -f /tmp/conns.txt
REMOTE
